sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79907" key="pa/sasqai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάσασθαι</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <sense id="n79907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πατέομαι, πάσσω</ref> </xr> : <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάσασθαι</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾱ]</pron>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
